title: hoarea selinifolia
intro: Hoarea selinifolia, also known as Horehound, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe coughs and relieve respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hoarea selinifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments.
